summaryAm: ትንሽ ልጅ የሚያበስል ማሰሮ ሲያገኝ መስማትን እና ማጋራትን የሚማርበት ታሪክ።
moralAm: አስተምሮ መስማት እና ቃልን በጥንቃቄ መጠቀም ቤትን ያስደስታል።

source.name: Public-domain classic
source.notes: Traditional/public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: ትንሽ ልጅ ከደግ አያት ትንሽ ማሰሮ ተቀበለ።
pages.textEn: A little child received a small pot from a kind grandmother.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Magic Porridge Pot, page 1: ትንሽ ልጅ ከደግ አያት ትንሽ ማሰሮ ተቀበለ።

pages.textAm: “በደግ ቃል ገንፎ ይበስላል፣ በደግ ቃልም ይቆማል” አለቻት አያቷ።
pages.textEn: Grandmother said kind words would make porridge start and stop.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Magic Porridge Pot, page 2: “በደግ ቃል ገንፎ ይበስላል፣ በደግ ቃልም ይቆማል” አለቻት አያቷ።

pages.textAm: ልጁ ቃሉን አለ፣ ሞቃት ገንፎም በማሰሮው ተሞላ።
pages.textEn: The child said the words, and warm porridge filled the pot.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Magic Porridge Pot, page 3: ልጁ ቃሉን አለ፣ ሞቃት ገንፎም በማሰሮው ተሞላ።

pages.textEn: The family shared the porridge with neighbors.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Magic Porridge Pot, page 4: ቤተሰቡ ገንፎውን ከጎረቤቶች ጋር አጋራ።

pages.textAm: አንድ ጊዜ ሰው የማቆሚያውን ቃል ረሳ፣ ገንፎውም ትንሽ ብዙ ሆነ።
pages.textEn: Once someone forgot the stopping words, and there was a little too much porridge.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Magic Porridge Pot, page 5: አንድ ጊዜ ሰው የማቆሚያውን ቃል ረሳ፣ ገንፎውም ትንሽ ብዙ ሆነ።

pages.textAm: ልጁ በቀስታ ቃሉን አስታወሰ። ሁሉም የማቆሚያውን ቃል በቀላሉ ለማስታወስ መንገድ መፈለግ ጀመሩ።
pages.textEn: The child calmly remembered the words, and everyone began looking for an easy way to remember the stopping words.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Magic Porridge Pot, page 6: a child calmly remembering the stopping words while family looks for a reminder.

pages.textAm: ልጁ ቃላቱን በትንሽ ወረቀት ላይ ጻፈ። አያቱም “አስፈላጊ ቃል በጥንቃቄ ይጠበቃል” አለች።
pages.textEn: The child drew the words on a little paper so he could remember them.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Little child drawing reminder words beside a small porridge pot.

pages.textAm: ገንፎው ሲበስል ቤቱ በሞቃት ሽታ ተሞላ። ልጁ መጀመሪያ ለአያቱ ትንሽ ሳህን አቀረበ።
pages.textEn: When the porridge cooked, he served his grandmother first.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Little child serving a small bowl of porridge to grandmother.

pages.textAm: ጎረቤቶች ሲመጡ ሁሉም ለማጋራት ሳህን አመጡ። ማሰሮውም ለሁሉም በቂ ሞቃት ገንፎ ሰጠ።
pages.textEn: Neighbors brought bowls, and the pot made enough warm porridge for all.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Neighbors with bowls sharing warm porridge around a small pot.

pages.textAm: በተረሳው ቀን ገንፎው ከማሰሮው በላይ በቀስታ ወጣ። ሰዎቹ አልተጨነቁም፤ ልጁን ጠሩ።
pages.textEn: When the words were forgotten, the porridge rose gently and everyone called the child.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Porridge gently rising from a pot while family calls for the little child.

pages.textAm: ልጁ የማቆሚያውን ቃል በጸጥታ አለ። ገንፎው ቆመ፣ ሁሉም ቃልን መስማት እና ማስታወስ እንደሚጠቅም ተማሩ።
pages.textEn: The child calmly said the stopping words, and everyone learned to listen and remember.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Little child calmly stopping a magic porridge pot while everyone smiles.
